Item.name: never
Item.description: Do not use as state at all.

Item.name: avoid
Item.description: Use as state, if it cannot be avoided (but only if variable appears differentiated and no other potential state with attribute default, prefer, or always can be selected).

Item.name: default
Item.description: Use as state if appropriate, but only if variable appears differentiated.

Item.name: prefer
Item.description: Prefer it as state over those having the default value (also variables can be selected, which do not appear differentiated).

Item.name: always
Item.description: Do use it as a state.

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Fluid.Types.Dynamics
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define definition of balance equations

Item.name: DynamicFreeInitial
Item.description: DynamicFreeInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: FixedInitial
Item.description: FixedInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial value fixed

Item.name: SteadyStateInitial
Item.description: SteadyStateInitial -- Dynamic balance, Steady state initial with guess value

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: SteadyState -- Steady state balance, Initial guess value

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Utilities.Types.Compare
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining comparison of two strings

Item.name: Less
Item.description: String 1 is lexicographically less than string 2

Item.name: Greater
Item.description: String 1 is lexicographically greater than string 2

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Fluid.Types.PortFlowDirection
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define whether flow reversal is allowed

Item.name: Bidirectional
Item.description: No restrictions on fluid flow (flow reversal possible)

SimpleType.name: Buildings.BoundaryConditions.Types.RadiationDataSource
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define solar radiation data source

Item.name: Input_HGloHor_HDifHor
Item.description: Global horizontal and diffuse horizontal radiation from connector

Item.name: Input_HDirNor_HDifHor
Item.description: Direct normal and diffuse horizontal radiation from connector

Item.name: Input_HDirNor_HGloHor
Item.description: Direct normal and global horizontal radiation from connector

SimpleType.name: Buildings.BoundaryConditions.Types.SkyTemperatureCalculation
SimpleType.description: Enumeration for computation of sky temperature

Item.name: TemperaturesAndSkyCover
Item.description: Use dry-bulb and dew-point temperatures and sky cover

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Smoothness
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the smoothness of table interpolation

Item.name: ContinuousDerivative
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Akima splines) such that the first derivative is continuous

Item.name: ConstantSegments
Item.description: Table points are not interpolated, but the value from the previous abscissa point is returned

Item.name: MonotoneContinuousDerivative1
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Fritsch-Butland splines) such that the monotonicity is preserved and the first derivative is continuous

Item.name: MonotoneContinuousDerivative2
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Steffen splines) such that the monotonicity is preserved and the first derivative is continuous

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Extrapolation
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the extrapolation of table interpolation

Item.name: HoldLastPoint
Item.description: Hold the first/last table point outside of the table scope

Item.name: LastTwoPoints
Item.description: Extrapolate by using the derivative at the first/last table points outside of the table scope

Item.name: Stages
Item.description: Use integer input to select stage

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Init
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining initialization of a block

Item.name: NoInit
Item.description: No initialization (start values are used as guess values with fixed=false)

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: Steady state initialization (derivatives of states are zero)

Item.name: InitialOutput
Item.description: Initialization with initial outputs (and steady state of the states if possible)

SimpleType.name: Buildings.Fluid.Movers.BaseClasses.Types.PrescribedVariable
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to choose what variable is prescribed

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.AnalogFilter
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the method of filtering

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.FilterType
SimpleType.description: Enumeration of analog filter types (low, high, band pass or band stop filter)

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.SimpleController
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining P, PI, PD, or PID simple controller type

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.InitPID
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining initialization of PID and LimPID blocks

Item.name: NoInit
Item.description: No initialization (start values are used as guess values with fixed=false)

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: Steady state initialization (derivatives of states are zero)

Item.name: InitialOutput
Item.description: Initialization with initial outputs (and steady state of the states if possible)

Item.name: DoNotUse_InitialIntegratorState
Item.description: Do not use, only for backward compatibility (initialize only integrator state)

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].ports[2].h_outflow

ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].ports[2].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].prescribedHeatFlowRate
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the model has a prescribed heat flow at its heatPort. If the heat flow rate at the heatPort is only based on temperature difference, then set to false

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to cause port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: rad.vol[1].use_C_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for trace substance

ScalarVariable.description: Absolute temperature as output signal

ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.A
ScalarVariable.description: Face area

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.ReC
ScalarVariable.description: Reynolds number where transition to turbulent starts

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.a
ScalarVariable.description: Coefficient a for damper characteristics

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.b
ScalarVariable.description: Coefficient b for damper characteristics

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal mass flow rate where transition to turbulent occurs

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.dp_nominalIncludesDamper
ScalarVariable.description: set to true if dp_nominal includes the pressure loss of the open damper

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.filter.x[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Filter states

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.filter.x[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Filter states

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of damper plus fixed resistance, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.k0
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient for y=0, k0 = pressure drop divided by dynamic pressure

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.k1
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient for y=1, k1 = pressure drop divided by dynamic pressure

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.kDam
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of damper, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.kFixed
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of fixed resistance that may be in series with damper, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.order
ScalarVariable.description: Order of filter

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_a.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_b.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.rho
ScalarVariable.description: Medium density

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Rise time of the filter (time to reach 99.6 % of an opening step)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.roundDuct
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true for round duct, false for square cross section

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.show_T
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if actual temperature at port is computed

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.use_constant_density
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to use constant density for flow friction

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.use_deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to use deltaM for turbulent transition, else ReC is used

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.use_inputFilter
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if opening is filtered with a 2nd order CriticalDamping filter

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.v_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal face velocity

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.y
ScalarVariable.description: Actuator position (0: closed, 1: open)

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.yL
ScalarVariable.description: Lower value for damper curve

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.yU
ScalarVariable.description: Upper value for damper curve

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.y_actual
ScalarVariable.description: Actual valve position

ScalarVariable.name: vavDam.y_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value of output

ScalarVariable.name: walCap.C
ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity of element (= cp*m)

ScalarVariable.name: walCap.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of element

ScalarVariable.name: walCap.der_T
ScalarVariable.description: Time derivative of temperature (= der(T))

ScalarVariable.name: walCap.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: walCap.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate from port_a -> port_b

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.R
ScalarVariable.description: Constant thermal resistance of material

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.dT
ScalarVariable.description: port_a.T - port_b.T

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.port_a.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.port_a.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.port_b.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: wallRes.port_b.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.description: Latitude of the location

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.lon
ScalarVariable.description: Longitude of the location

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.nOpa
ScalarVariable.description: Sky cover [0, 1]

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.nTot
ScalarVariable.description: Sky cover [0, 1]

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.pAtm
ScalarVariable.description: Atmospheric pressure

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.relHum
ScalarVariable.description: Relative humidity

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.solAlt
ScalarVariable.description: Solar altitude angle

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.solDec
ScalarVariable.description: Solar declination angle

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.solHouAng
ScalarVariable.description: Solar hour angle

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.solTim
ScalarVariable.description: Solar time

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.solZen
ScalarVariable.description: Zenith angle

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.winDir
ScalarVariable.description: Wind direction

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.weaBus.winSpe
ScalarVariable.description: Wind speed

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.winDir
ScalarVariable.description: Wind direction (used if winDir=Parameter)

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.winDirSou
ScalarVariable.description: Wind direction

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.winSpe
ScalarVariable.description: Wind speed (used if winSpe=Parameter)

ScalarVariable.name: weaDat.winSpeSou
ScalarVariable.description: Wind speed

ScalarVariable.name: window.T_ref
ScalarVariable.description: Reference temperature

ScalarVariable.name: window.alpha
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature coefficient of heat flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: window.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: window.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: zone.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: zone.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: zone.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of the component

ScalarVariable.name: zone.X_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: zone.X_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: zone.Xi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Species concentration of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: zone.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal. Used only if model has two ports.

ScalarVariable.name: zone.dynBal.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of fluid

ScalarVariable.name: zone.dynBal.mXi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Masses of independent components in the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: zone.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: zone.heatPort.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: zone.heatPort.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: zone.initialize_p
ScalarVariable.description: = true to set up initial equations for pressure

ScalarVariable.name: zone.m
ScalarVariable.description: Mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: zone.mSenFac
ScalarVariable.description: Factor for scaling the sensible thermal mass of the volume

ScalarVariable.name: zone.mXi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Species mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: zone.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: zone.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: zone.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: zone.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: zone.p
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: zone.p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[1].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[2].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[2].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[2].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: zone.ports[2].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: zone.prescribedHeatFlowRate
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the model has a prescribed heat flow at its heatPort. If the heat flow rate at the heatPort is only based on temperature difference, then set to false

ScalarVariable.name: zone.simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to cause port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero

ScalarVariable.name: zone.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: zone.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: zone.use_C_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for trace substance
